pi_items.source: Task scripts directly query for value='OUTDOOR-FURN' in m_product_category table
verifier.py checks category.get('name') == 'Outdoor Furniture' in SQL result
iDempiere API documentation confirms MMPOLICY_FiFo = "F" (First In, First Out). Source: https://jenkins-artifacts.idempiere.org/javadocdev/org/compiere/model/X_AD_Client.html

verifier.py checks if abs(margin - 20.0) < 0.1 on plannedmargin field. iDempiere Product Category documentation confirms Planned Margin % is a percentage field. Source: https://wiki.idempiere.org/en/Product_Category_(Window_ID-144)
Patio Chair is a real product in GardenWorld sample data with M_Product_ID=133, confirmed in task 'update_export_pricelist_and_create_order' metadata

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a new Product Category with search key OUTDOOR-FURN and name 'Outdoor Furniture' in iDempiere's GardenWorld dataset. The category uses FiFo (First In, First Out) as the Material Policy, stored as 'F' in the database, with a planned margin of 20%. The product 'Patio Chair' (M_Product_ID=133) is an existing product in the GardenWorld sample data that will be reclassified to this new category. All metadata values are correct and consistent with iDempiere's database schema and standard business configuration practices.
